risk if misplaced: Saved changes may land in the wrong plugin or overwrite an unintended active file
verification step: Check active file before save and inspect git/mod-manager timestamps afterward

expected location: .psc under the mod or source workspace expected by the compiler
risk if misplaced: CK or compiler may use stale or missing source
verification step: Confirm source include roots and compile target before CK wiring

expected location: .pex under the shipped mod's Scripts folder
risk if misplaced: CK cannot attach script or game logs missing script
verification step: Check .pex timestamp and game-visible Scripts folder

expected location: Source/Scripts or CK output source folder
risk if misplaced: Fragment edits may compile from stale source or shadow real source
verification step: Inspect CK output and target source folders after fragment edits

expected location: Scripts folder shipped with the mod
risk if misplaced: Quest stage or dialogue fragment does not run in game
verification step: Confirm .pex exists and VMAD references the same generated script name

risk if misplaced: Start Game Enabled quest/dialogue/scenes may fail until reload or not appear
verification step: Regenerate after eligible quest/dialogue changes and confirm packaged Seq path

expected location: Data/DialogueViews XML path for editable views
risk if misplaced: Collaborators may be unable to see dialogue graph layout
verification step: Check XML exists when dialogue view editability matters

expected location: Skyrim root or chosen export location
risk if misplaced: Voice/script planning may use stale line counts
verification step: Regenerate after dialogue changes when planning recording or scene exports

expected location: Skyrim root or chosen export location
risk if misplaced: Voice/scene recording script may not match current scene
verification step: Export after scene/dialogue edits and archive with release notes if needed

risk if misplaced: Meshes/textures may not ship with plugin or may shadow old assets
verification step: Check asset watcher settings and target mod asset folders

risk if misplaced: NPC edits can ship dark face or missing facegen
verification step: Regenerate and verify facegen files after NPC face edits

expected location: Target plugin or deliberate cleaned copy
risk if misplaced: Cleaning may affect the wrong copy or hide intentional edits
verification step: Check file timestamp, masters, and xEdit messages after cleaning

expected location: Configured xEdit output mod Seq folder
risk if misplaced: SEQ may sit in xEdit output and not ship with the mod
verification step: Move or configure output so Seq/<PluginName>.seq is in the target mod

risk if misplaced: Generated files may be active accidentally or omitted from release
verification step: Inspect overwrite after every CK/xEdit generation pass

expected location: Stock game or CKPE configuration path used by loader
risk if misplaced: Assumed CK fixes/settings may not apply
verification step: Record CKPE version/settings and smoke-test CK startup

expected location: User documents Skyrim Special Edition Logs/Script path
risk if misplaced: Runtime evidence may be missed or confused with old sessions
verification step: Clear or timestamp logs before smoke tests and inspect newest log
